changeLog.what: Added description, anatomy descriptions, Usage guidelines and properties

properties.name: Actions
properties.description: The actions that this contextual menu should have. Optionally also sets wether specific actions should be grouped in action groups.

table.name: Nested actions icon
table.description: This icon is used to indicate that a group of actions have been nested inside of it

table.name: Action icon
table.description: Optional icon that can be used to represent and enhance the meaning of the action text.

table.name: Action text
table.description: The text of the action item is used to tell the user what sort of action it performs. It should be set to something that gives the user a clear understanding which action is being performed when executing it.

table.name: Separator
table.description: A separator that visually separates action groups from each other.

table.name: Nested actions
table.description: A group of actions which has been nested inside of a single item.

table.name: Action
table.description: A single action. Clicking it will perform the action that is associated with it.
